ui_hierarchy._note: Mirror of the ui_hierarchy generated by get_param() in jv880_plugin.cpp (the LIVE path in a Signal Chain slot, rendered by the platform's shadow_ui.js). Per-tone editing uses EXPLICIT per-tone levels (tone1..tone4, tone1_wave..tone4_fx) with fully-qualified nvram_tone_<n>_<param> keys, because the chain renderer keys every entry as synth:<key> and has NO tone_section/tone_prefix support and does not carry a child_prefix context into navigated sub-levels. This mirror shows tone1 explicitly; tone2..tone4 are identical with the index changed. Full param lists live in the C source.

tone1_pitch.name: Pitch
tone1_pitch._note: explicit nvram_tone_0_* keys; see C source

tone1_filter.name: Filter
tone1_filter._note: explicit nvram_tone_0_* keys; see C source

tone1_amp.name: Amp
tone1_amp._note: explicit nvram_tone_0_* keys; see C source

tone1_lfo1.name: LFO 1
tone1_lfo1._note: explicit nvram_tone_0_* keys; see C source

tone1_lfo2.name: LFO 2
tone1_lfo2._note: explicit nvram_tone_0_* keys; see C source

tone1_fx.name: FX Sends
tone1_fx._note: explicit nvram_tone_0_* keys; see C source

tone2_etc.name: (tone2..tone4 mirror tone1 with the index changed; see C source)
